skip_audit.reason: Reference/ops material — failure-rate thresholds, dashboard pointers and runbook prose. Behavior already covered by tests/scraper/test_circuit_breaker.py at the unit level.
Behavioral fast-skip rule: clean step short-circuits when staging directory has no junk markers. Promote to a contract test before the 2026-11-08 expiry.
Behavioral move-rule: new media routed to disk with most free space (DESIGN move-rules in CLAUDE.md). Promote to a contract test before the 2026-11-08 expiry.

Behavioral umbrella for the dispatch step (replace movies / merge TV / route new media). Section-level contract; per-rule contracts already live in tests/integration/test_design_dispatch.py. Promote a section-level smoke contract before the 2026-11-08 expiry.
Behavioral idempotence invariant: re-running a step on already-processed input is a no-op. Promote to a contract test before the 2026-11-08 expiry.
Reference index/header for the document — no contract to test. Tracked here so the auditor reports zero orphan sections.
Ops/reference material — documents which rsync flags are used and why; behavior is exercised end-to-end via dispatch tests. No standalone contract to pin.
Behavioral two-phase commit: staging area only flips to the destination on success. Promote to a contract test before the 2026-11-08 expiry.
Reference material — documents the per-step CLI invocation surface. Behavior covered by tests/commands/test_pipeline_commands.py.
Behavioral umbrella: each pipeline step has an idempotence + crash-resume contract. Promote step-level contract tests before the 2026-11-08 expiry.

Behavioral verify-step contract: post-dispatch checksum + filesystem-state validation. Surface contracts already live in tests/verify/test_verifier.py; promote a design-level contract before the 2026-11-08 expiry.
